props.name: showNode
props.description:
Programmatically show a node by `id`.
By default, the matching node will be expanded, selected, and focused.
Use the options parameter to customize this behavior.

tags.name: example

props.type: (id: TreeNodeId, options?: { expand?: boolean; select?: boolean; focus?: boolean }) => void

params.name: id
params.description: The id of the node to show
